back:
普遍的，广泛的

记忆：wide + spread（广泛传播）
example: Mental health issues among college students have become a widespread concern in society.
extra:
常用于描述社会现象、问题的普遍性
近义词：prevalent, universal
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
焦虑，不安

记忆：anxi（紧张）+ -ety（名词后缀）
example: An increasing number of students suffer from anxiety and depression.
extra:
派生词：anxious (adj.) 焦虑的
搭配：suffer from anxiety, anxiety disorder
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
抑郁，沮丧；萧条

记忆：depress（使沮丧）+ -ion
example: Many students suffer from anxiety and depression during their academic years.
extra:
派生词：depress (v.) 使沮丧, depressed (adj.) 沮丧的
注意：大写 Depression 特指经济大萧条
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

example: The fierce competition in the job market places enormous pressure on students.
extra:
派生词：compete (v.), competitive (adj.) 有竞争力的
搭配：fierce/intense competition 激烈竞争
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

example: The fierce competition places enormous pressure on students.
extra:
搭配：under pressure 在压力下, peer pressure 同辈压力
近义词：stress, burden
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
适应

记忆：ad + apt（合适的）→ 使合适 → 适应
example: Many students struggle to adapt to independent campus life.
extra:
搭配：adapt to new environment, adapt to changes
近义词：adjust to, get used to
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
孤立的，隔绝的

记忆：island（岛）→ 像孤岛一样 → 孤立
extra:
派生词：isolate (v.) 隔离, isolation (n.) 隔离
搭配：feel isolated, socially isolated
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
过度的，过多的

记忆：exceed（超过）→ excessive（过度的）
example: The excessive use of social media has aggravated their psychological burden.
extra:
派生词：excess (n.) 过量, excessively (adv.) 过度地
搭配：excessive use, excessive consumption
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
加重，使恶化

记忆：ag + grav（重）+ -ate → 使变重
example: Excessive use of social media has aggravated their psychological burden.
extra:
近义词：worsen, intensify
搭配：aggravate the situation, aggravate the problem
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
必要的，本质的

记忆：essenc（本质）+ -ial
example: It is essential for universities to strengthen mental health education.
extra:
用法：It is essential to do sth / that 从句（虚拟语气）
近义词：vital, crucial, indispensable
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

extra:
同类构词：wide→widen, short→shorten, weak→weaken
搭配：strengthen cooperation, strengthen awareness
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
咨询服务（尤指心理辅导）

记忆：counsel（建议）+ -ing
extra:
搭配：psychological counseling, career counseling
派生词：counselor (n.) 顾问
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
保持，维持；维护

记忆：main + tain（持）→ 主持 → 维持
example: Students should learn to maintain a positive attitude.
extra:
搭配：maintain health, maintain order, maintain relationships
近义词：preserve, sustain
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
积极的；正面的

记忆：posit（放置）+ -ive → 放好心态 → 积极
example: Students should learn to maintain a positive attitude.
extra:
反义词：negative 消极的
搭配：positive attitude, positive effect, positive feedback
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
促成，导致；有助于

记忆：con（共同）+ tribute（给予）→ 共同给予 → 促成
extra:
注意：contribute to 后接名词/动名词
近义词：lead to, result in
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康

back:
激烈的；凶猛的

联想：fire（火）→ 像火一样激烈
example: The fierce competition in the job market places enormous pressure on students.
extra:
搭配：fierce competition 激烈竞争, fierce debate 激烈辩论
近义词：intense, violent
Source: 六级作文·大学生心理健康
